contexts.context: ...says, "At the present day it is a <mark>blacksmith</mark> that shines—Vulcan was the son of Jupiter...
...illustration is rather magnificent. By-the-by, to what <mark>blacksmith</mark> does he allude?—we must confess our ignorance....
...), Acis and Galatea (1718), The Harmonious <mark>Blacksmith</mark> (1720), Giulio Cesare (1724), Tamerlano...
...as fast and heavily as the strokes of a <mark>blacksmith's</mark> hammer; ideas are powerful when, like Ossian's ghosts...
